new_value:
{"description":"Implement the analysis engine: load prompt files with YAML frontmatter, resolve depends_on DAG, inject {sessions}/{patterns}/{workflows} template variables, call LLM backend, extract JSON with retry logic.

Define AnalysisResult and ResultMetadata dataclasses (output types of this stage):
- AnalysisResult: timestamp, session_count, sessions_skipped, workflows, patterns, crystallization, custom, metadata
- ResultMetadata: backend, model, condensation_mode, prompt_versions (dict analyzer_id->version), duration_ms

CLI backend mode: shell out via TOML config. Built-in backend: claude_cli.toml. Command format: pipe prompt via stdin ('echo "$prompt" | claude -p') rather than shell argument to avoid quoting/length issues. context_limit=180000.

Built-in prompts: workflows.md, patterns.md, crystallize.md (all three from the spec). JSON extraction with one retry on parse failure."}

CLI backend mode: shell out via TOML config. Built-in backend: claude_cli.toml using 'claude -p' with context_limit=180000. Built-in prompts: workflows.md, patterns.md, crystallize.md (all three from the spec).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-05T18:21:18Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-05T18:21:18Z"}

new_value: {"description":"Implement the ingestor discovery engine with two-phase detection (extension → content sniff) and priority resolution. Built-in ingestors: claude_code.py (JSONL with tool_use/tool_result), generic.py (markdown fallback, PRIORITY=-100). Engine handles directory recursion; ingestors parse single files.\n\nStdin contract: when path is '-', extension-based detection is impossible. The engine must require --ingestor flag for stdin input and error clearly if absent: 'Stdin input requires --ingestor flag. Available ingestors: claude_code, generic.' This is the ingestor engine's responsibility, not the CLI wiring layer."}
old_value: {"id":"khipu-k4t","title":"Ingestor engine + claude_code and generic built-in ingestors","description":"Implement the ingestor discovery engine with two-phase detection (extension → content sniff) and priority resolution. Engine handles directory recursion; ingestors parse single files.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-05T18:21:06Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-05T18:21:06Z"}

{"id":"khipu-d8y","title":"Condensation: deterministic session compression","description":"Implement deterministic condensation (no LLM). Strip tool call I/O bodies, keep tool names/file paths/success booleans. First 100 chars of human messages, 80 chars of agent messages. Output structured JSON summary per session. Auto mode: estimate tokens as len/4, condense if sessions exceed 70% of backend context_limit. Flags: --condense (always), --no-condense (never).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-05T18:21:14Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-05T18:21:14Z"}

{"id":"khipu-b3p","title":"Emitter: Jinja2 markdown output template","description":"Implement the emit stage. emit(result, template='markdown') renders an AnalysisResult through a Jinja2 template. Default markdown template produces a human-readable report with sections for workflows, patterns, and crystallization scores. --emit flag on the CLI.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-05T18:21:22Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-05T18:21:22Z"}
